# **Product Requirement Document (PRD)**

## **Project: fypd — High-Retention Vertical Video Orchestrator**

### **1\. Executive Summary**

fypd is an automated video curation and reframing pipeline designed to extract highly viral, 9:16 vertical shorts from long-form 16:9 widescreen video files. By decoupling the heavyweight video editing operations (FFmpeg, Whisper, MoviePy) from the AI orchestration layer, the system provides a highly scalable architecture consisting of a **Client-side UI Orchestrator Dashboard** and a **Localized Python Kinetic Editing Core**.

### **2\. System Architecture & Data Flow**

The platform utilizes a modern, zero-database architecture to minimize overhead and protect API keys.

\+─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────+  
|                  Client Browser (index.html)                |  
|  \- Manages Gemini API Key (BYOK)                            |  
|  \- Accepts YouTube URL                                      |  
|  \- Orchestrates Structured Generation Requests to Gemini    |  
|  \- Renders Clip Blueprints, Timelines, & Social Captions   |  
|  \- Packages & Generates Complete Local Codebase (.zip)       |  
\+──────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────+  
                               │  
                Structured JSON Timeline Schema  
                               │  
                               ▼  
\+─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────+  
|                Local Core Engine (Python Runtime)           |  
|  \- Pulls down tiny byte-range slices via yt-dlp             |  
|  \- Locates optimal conversational cut marks (Audio RMS)     |  
|  \- Handles kinetic zooming, reframing, & crop matrices      |  
|  \- Transcribes dialogue via Whisper "Small" model           |  
|  \- Burns premium drop-shadowed kinetic typography           |  
\+─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────+

### **3\. Functional Requirements**

#### **3.1 BYOK Security & API Integration**

* The UI Orchestrator must run completely in the user's browser context.  
* Users supply their own Google Gemini API Key, stored strictly in localized memory (localStorage) and never leaked to external servers.  
* The API connection queries the gemini-2.5-flash-preview-09-2025 model using native Structured JSON mode to guarantee schema integrity.

#### **3.2 Dynamic Layout Splicing (Crop Mode)**

* Widescreen videos are converted into 9:16 vertical files using the following coordinate-shifting rules:  
  * **Center:** Centers the viewport at coordinate ![][image1].  
  * **Left:** Focuses on the left side of the screen ![][image2], typically capturing presentation screens, coding terminals, or documents.  
  * **Right:** Focuses on the right side of the screen ![][image3], tracking guest facecams or side-grid tiles.

#### **3.3 Audio-Aware Cut Syncing**

* The Python engine evaluates the Root-Mean-Square (RMS) volume envelope of localized audio tracks within a ![][image4]\-second look-ahead window.  
* Visual cuts and camera pans are dynamically shifted to map onto the nearest local minimum (speech silence gaps), keeping transitions smooth and professional.

#### **3.4 Captions & Transcription Matrix**

* Audio tracks are downsampled to a clean ![][image5] mono frequency before parsing with OpenAI's **Whisper Small** model.  
* To eliminate Devanagari character render bugs on mixed Hindi/English ("Hinglish") videos, the system uses implicit, example-based transcription prompts.  
* Text wrapping is capped at **2 words per frame** to create rapid-fire, high-retention typography.  
* Drop-shadows are rendered using a layered dual-clip architecture, offset by ![][image6] on both axes.

### **4\. Technical Specifications**

#### **4.1 Local Directory Layout**

viral\_clipper/  
│  
├── app.py            \<-- Universal Multi-Cam Automation Engine  
├── clips.json        \<-- AI Generated Curation Timeline  
├── requirements.txt  \<-- System Dependency Configurations  
└── README.md         \<-- Initialization & Usage Guides

#### **4.2 Pinned System Dependencies (requirements.txt)**

* yt-dlp\>=2023.11.16 (Enables byte-range chunk streaming downloads)  
* openai-whisper\>=20231117 (High-accuracy multilingual speech transcription)  
* moviepy\>=1.0.3,\<2.0.0 (Universal timeline composing framework)  
* numpy\>=1.24.0 (Enables high-performance audio frame RMS calculations)
